title: oxybasis rubra var. intermedia
intro: Oxybasis rubra var. intermedia, also known as red orache, is a plant species that belongs to the amaranth family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Red orache is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a food ingredient, particularly in traditional Scandinavian cuisine.
